summary: Reframed the opening away from the adjacent roof-and-heat setup by anchoring it at Halima's threshold with carryover from Chapter 2, and tightened the final beat so the paperwork pressure hands off more cleanly into Chapter 4 without changing scene causality.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin at the doorway and yard, carrying forward the previous chapter's watched threshold.
Compressed the repeated morning-sound and roof-heat setup just after the opening to keep the entry distinct from Chapter 4.
Adjusted the closing line to foreshadow papers arriving on Halima's mat under the same noon heat.
